title: Supernova Sky Overlay
description: A mesmerizing sky overlay depicting a supernova
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8ce2d509668c1e24199def77f967a64a86e6a4.png)

### What is this resource pack?
This resource pack is an overlay which replaces the default minecraft sky with a beautiful interstellar sky.

---

### Requirements
- Needs Optifine
- Custom Sky should be turned on
- Stars / Sun and Moon should be turned on

---

### How to use this resource pack?
This is compatible with all other resource packs, just make sure you put it on top of the one you are already using.
